name: explicit e2e lane
prompt: Run the software-only gNB plus Open5GS plus srsUE ZeroMQ proof-of-concept lane on this PC.

name: attach and ping poc
prompt: Use the pinned Open5GS core and the ZMQ configs to try the attach plus ping proof of concept.

name: dry run e2e
prompt: Show me the container commands for the ZMQ Open5GS proof-of-concept lane before running them.

name: reuse installed trees
prompt: Use the existing install trees to run the gNB and srsUE ZeroMQ lane.

name: negative local lane
prompt: Run the no-core split CU DU local runtime stage.

name: negative open5gs core
prompt: Bring up or check the vendored Open5GS core compose stack.

name: negative skill qa
prompt: Run the QA gate against a tracked skill before promotion.
